rulings.Case Title: SAYURI MARTIN VS. SAM FINI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 26, 2026. Line 1.3. DEFENDANT SAM FINI MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD is continued to February 5, 2026 to be heard after the Motion to Continue Trial. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: LENDERS COMMERICIAL FINANCE, LLC VS. KEYHAN MOHANNA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-25-622142 WITH CASE CGC-25-622140
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 26, 2026. Line 2. PLAINTIFF LENDERS COMMERICIAL FINANCE, LLC MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-25-622142 WITH CASE CGC-25-622140 is DENIED without prejudice. The motion is not accompanied by argument or evidence to support the contention that the issues in these actions are substantially identical. Conclusory statement in the declaration of Lawrence Fasano is not sufficient. The Court also notes that Plaintiff argues in the motion that there is a "risk of inconsistent rulings on the ownership of the same parcel of real property." However, Exhibits A to each of the complaints subject to this motion describe different parcels. Compare: "Condominium Unit No. 1, Lot 50" vs. Condominium Unit No. 6, Lot 55." No explanation is provided for the claim re: "same parcel of real property." =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not notified, and the opposing party does not appear.
